title.en: As soon as Ouyang Jiu'er came out, he asked.

content.en:
Terran.

Ye Tian came back with Ouyang Jiu'er, and as soon as he came back, he released Ouyang Jiu'er from the universe in his body.

"Is it safe?"

As soon as Ouyang Jiu'er came out, he asked.

"It's safe, we've returned to the human race!At present, the strongest true ancestors of the Zixia Sect have not chased and killed!However, this time my identity has been exposed, and I have completely offended a Sevenfold Heaven Force, which can be described as a big loss!" Ye Tian sighed, but his eyes were staring at Ouyang Jiu'er, as if he wanted Ouyang Jiu'er to make up for some benefits.

Ouyang Jiu'er also felt a little sorry for Ye Tian, so she said: "Brother Ye, I don't know what you need, you can talk about it, I'll find out if I have it." "

Ye Tian's heart moved, and said: "My True Ancestor's power is very slow to improve, you also know that my True Ancestor's power has forbidden attributes, and the quality is very high, so the ascension speed is very slow and slow, in such a big era, I also want to quickly improve the power of my True Ancestor as soon as possible!"

"Quickly improve the power of the True Ancestor!" Ouyang Jiu'er pondered for a while, then said, "I don't have many treasures in my hands that can improve the power of the True Ancestor. In fact, your cultivation speed is already very fast, if you want to improve your cultivation quickly, you can only go to the Emperor Pulp Realm!"

"Emperor Pulp Realm?"

When Ye Tian heard about this place for the first time, he was a little curious and asked, "Where is the Emperor Pulp Realm?"

Ouyang Jiu'er said: "The Emperor Pulp Realm is a very mysterious world in the Domain Realm, and there is an incomparably pure Emperor Pulp flowing in it, forming an endless ocean. The Emperor Slurry is the most suitable treasure to improve the power of the True Ancestor, and once it enters the Emperor Slurry, the cultivation speed will definitely increase many times. However, it is difficult for ordinary people to enter the Emperor Pulp Realm, and the Emperor Slurry only allows True Ancestors to enter, and Dao Ancestors cannot enter. It is said that the Emperor Pulp Realm is a world opened up by the Lord of the Domain Realm, and it is the welfare of the True Ancestors. If the True Ancestors want to enter the Emperor Pulp Realm, they must hold the Emperor Pulp Order. Originally, the Emperor Pulp Order was a benefit distributed by the Heavenly Emperor Palace to the Upper Triple Heaven forces. But now, the domain realm has been shattered, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace doesn't seem to have been born, so I don't know if it didn't enter the Daoshan realm with the fragments of the domain realm, or if it was still hiding behind the scenes. And without the Imperial Pulp Order, you can't enter the Imperial Pulp Realm!"

"Heavenly Emperor Palace, Emperor Pulp Realm, it turns out that this is the case!"

Ye Tian understood.

No wonder, he had never heard of the Emperor Pulp Realm, and it turned out that he needed the Heavenly Emperor Palace to issue the Emperor Pulp Order before he could enter the Emperor Pulp Realm.

The Heavenly Emperor's Palace is the force established by the Lord of the Domain Realm, known as the Heavenly Army!

The power of the Heavenly Emperor Palace far surpassed those Upper Triple Heaven forces, it was a legendary-level force, and it was also the main force in the battle of the domain realm.

In short, the Heavenly Emperor's Palace is very mysterious.

And Black Wind Mountain has not been rated as the Upper Triple Heaven Force, I am afraid that there is no Emperor Pulp Order at all, otherwise a general like him would not be unaware.

And now, the Heavenly Emperor Palace has disappeared, and the Emperor Pulp Order is estimated to be gone.

"Where is the Emperor's Pulp Order now?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Some of the Upper Triple Heaven forces may still have a few pieces of Emperor Pulp Order, and I also have one in my hand!"

Speaking of having a piece in his hand, Ouyang Jiu'er felt a little distressed in his heart.

If it was in her previous life, she didn't care about the Emperor Pulp Order, but now she really needs the Emperor Pulp Order.

Once she stepped into the ranks of True Ancestors, she would be able to enter the Emperor Pulp Realm, and her strength would increase significantly.

But Ye Tian offended a Sevenfold Heaven Force for her this time, and a Supreme True Ancestor offended the Sevenfold Heaven Force, which was life-threatening!

Therefore, she was embarrassed not to give benefits.

But at present, she has only obtained the resources in a secret realm, and there are not many good things, and the only thing that is a heavy treasure for Ye Tian is the Emperor Pulp Order.

"Then can you give me this imperial pulp order?"

Ye Tian asked shamelessly.

He won't be embarrassed, if he can get good things from the reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor powerhouse, he will try to get a little bit of it, in case Ouyang Jiu'er leaves in the future, where will he get these good things?

"Here you go!"

Ouyang Jiu'er took out the Emperor Pulp Order and handed it to Ye Tian.

The Emperor's Magma Order is red, with strips on the front like tiny lava flows, and on the back is the appearance of a palace, which represents the Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

Ye Tian took the emperor's order and immediately put it away, for fear that Ouyang Jiu'er would regret it.

"Jiu'er, the world promotion secret art and the Dao Codex ......"

Ye Tian asked in a low voice.

"Here you go!"

Ouyang Jiu'er took out the classics of the first layer of the world's promotion secret arts, as well as a copy of the Dao Codex of the Supreme Sword Dao Dao Ancestor, and gave them all to Ye Tian.

Ye Tianxian carefully browsed the content of the World Promotion Secret Technique, and soon his face changed slightly.

"The World Promotion Secret Technique requires the power of the Dark Taboo, at the beginning, you shouldn't know that I have mastered the power of the Dark Tabo, are you using this thing to trick me?" Ye Tian asked.

"Aren't you just mastering the power of the dark forbidden now, this secret technique is very suitable for you!" Ouyang Jiu'er said indifferently with a blushing face and a heartbeat.

Ye Tian couldn't say anything, after all, this thing was indeed useful to him, but it was useless to other races.

Originally, he thought that he had obtained a secret technique that could change the fate of the human race!

Now that I think about it, how can there be such a good thing!

In addition, Ouyang Jiu'er also gave the Dao Codex and the Emperor's Pulp Order, and he was embarrassed to say that Ouyang Jiu'er cheated him.

"Thank you anyway!"

Ye Tiandao.

Ouyang Jiu'er didn't stay here any longer, and after greeting Ye Tian, he left, obviously going to retreat and cultivate.

Her current strength is too weak, once she does not reach the rank of True Ancestor, she will have no confidence, and in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, it is too dangerous.

After Ouyang Jiu'er left, Ye Tian also entered a state of retreat, but he told the Terran to guard the territory of the Terran at all times, and also asked the true ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom to help keep an eye on the Zixia Sect, once the true ancestor of the Zixia Sect entered the Void Heaven True Country, then notify him immediately.

After entering the retreat, Ye Tian comprehended the mysteries of the Supreme Dao Dao contained in the Dao Codex, and at the same time cultivated the first level of the world's promotion to the secret art.

This layer of secret art is called Qi Tian Secret Art!

The core of Qi Tian's secret art is the power of the dark taboo, which is integrated into the inner world with the power of the dark taboo, so as to slowly transform the inner world, so that the rules of the inner world continue to be stronger, so as to reach the standard of promotion.

At the same time, it is necessary to refine many precious things and integrate them into the inner world, otherwise the inner world will not be nourished, and it will be difficult to be promoted successfully.

Once the first layer of Qi Tian's secret technique is cultivated, the inner world will be enough to reach a level comparable to the great universe, and at that time, the power of the True Ancestor that Ye Tian can store will far exceed that of before, and the combat endurance will be even stronger, and even the overall strength will be able to increase by one or two.

Under the acceleration of time, Ye Tian refined a large amount of resources, and used the power of the dark forbidden to continuously refine the rules of the universe in his body, so that the universe in his body continued to evolve.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

At this time, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm also ushered in the peak of the prosperous era.

For the forces of the domain realm, the strength has not increased much, but for the forces of the Daoshan realm, the strength has increased too much.

Many forces have given birth to a top True Ancestor, just like the Void Heaven True Country, there were only three top True Ancestors at the beginning, but now there are eight top True Ancestors.

There are also many top true ancestors born by the other four transcendent forces, and the Forbidden Hall has given birth to a supreme true ancestor, and Daoshan has also given birth to a supreme true ancestor.

In addition, there are too many True Ancestors of the Great Dao Mountain Realm forces, and the overall strength is far from comparable to that of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm when it was just born.

The strength of the Daoshan Realm skyrocketed, and he gradually began to think about the forces of the Domain Realm.

---------------

Terran, the place where Ye Tian retreated.

At this moment, Ye Tian has also finished his retreat, and his improvement has been many, many.

"The first layer of the Monkey King Secret Technique has been cultivated, and the universe in my body is much bigger than before, tens of thousands of times larger, and the power of the True Ancestor that can be contained is far greater than before, and the power of the Black Wind Domain Realm Technique is also much stronger than before!

"It's a pity that I don't have much understanding of the Dao Codex, and I only have a trace of aura at present, and I haven't even mastered a trace of fur!" Ye Tian sighed.

Of course, it's not that his comprehension is not good, in fact, his comprehension is already very rebellious, but his realm is too low, and his original understanding of the way of the sword is not enough.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was able to master a trace of the Xeon Sword Dao, it was the original Void Heaven Dao Ancestor who had been comprehending the Sword Dao for countless years, and the background was many times stronger than Ye Tian's, and he saw the sword traces of the Xeon Sword Dao Ancestor, and with the help of the special secret treasure to comprehend the sword marks, it was only after a long time that he had a flash of inspiration and comprehended a trace of fur.

This still depends on a certain amount of luck, if you do it all over again, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor does not dare to guarantee that he will be able to succeed in enlightenment.

"Don't be in a hurry, wait until you come back from the Emperor Pulp Realm, and then go all out to comprehend the Dao Codex, and you can definitely comprehend a trace of mystery!"

Ye Tian muttered.
